# Palo Alto Networks

> Global cybersecurity leader providing solutions for Zero Trust, Network Security, Cloud Workloads, and Threat Intelligence. We protect the digital way of life through disruption, execution, and collaboration.

## Company Overview
- [About Us](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/about-us): Our mission, values, and commitment to protecting the digital way of life.
- [Management Team](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/about-us/management): Executive leadership and management.
- [ESG & Corporate Responsibility](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/about-us/corporate-responsibility): Environmental, social, and governance strategies.
- [Why Palo Alto Networks](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/why-paloaltonetworks): Our differentiation as the cybersecurity partner of choice.
- [Platformization](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/why-paloaltonetworks/platformization): The benefits of a simplified, consolidated security platform.

## Cortex - AI-Driven Security Operations
> The leading AI-driven platform for SOC transformation, endpoint protection, and attack surface management.

- [Cortex Platform Overview](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex): Transforming security operations.
- [Cortex XSIAM](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xsiam): The autonomous SOC platform. Centralizes data and automates incident response.
- [Cortex XDR](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xdr): Extended Detection and Response for endpoints, network, and cloud.
- [Cortex XSOAR](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xsoar): Security orchestration, automation, and response.
- [Cortex Xpanse](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xpanse): Active attack surface management and exposure discovery.
- [Cloud Detection & Response (CDR)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cloud-detection-and-response): Visibility and protection across cloud environments.
- [AgentiX](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/agentix): Security for the AI agent workforce.

## Network Security (Strata)
> The Zero Trust Network Security Platform, including Next-Generation Firewalls (NGFW) and cloud-delivered security services.

- [Network Security Overview](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security): Integrated platform for hardware, software, and SASE.
- [Next-Generation Firewalls (NGFW)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/next-generation-firewall): ML-Powered physical and virtual firewalls.
- [PAN-OS](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/pan-os): The operating system powering our NGFWs.
- [Panorama](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/panorama): Centralized management for firewalls.
- [Strata Cloud Manager](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/strata-cloud-manager): AI-powered management and operations.
- [Advanced WildFire](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/advanced-wildfire): Cloud-based malware prevention engine.
- [Advanced Threat Prevention](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/advanced-threat-prevention): IPS solution blocking zero-day threats inline.
- [IoT/OT Security](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/network-security/device-security): Securing all devices from IT to IoT and OT.

## SASE
> The industry’s most complete SASE solution, converging network security, SD-WAN, and ADEM.

- [Prisma SASE Overview](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase): Converged network security and SD-WAN.
- [Prisma Access](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase/access): Secure remote access for the hybrid workforce.
- [Prisma SD-WAN](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase/sd-wan): Next-generation SD-WAN for branch transformation.
- [Prisma Browser](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase/prisma-browser): Secure enterprise browser for managed and unmanaged devices.
- [ADEM](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase/adem): Autonomous Digital Experience Management.
- [AI Access Security](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/sase/ai-access-security): Safe adoption and governance of GenAI apps.

## Identity Security
- [Identity Security Overview](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/identity-security): Secure every identity — human, machine, and AI agents — with intelligent privilege controls and lifecycle automation for continuous threat detection and prevention. ## Apply intelligent privilege controls across the entire identity lifecycle, including workforce & customer access, endpoint identity security, privileged access management (PAM), identity governance & administration (IGA), machine identity security, and secure cloud access.

## Unit 42 - Threat Intelligence & Services
> World-renowned threat researchers, incident responders, and security consultants.

- [Unit 42 Overview](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42): Proactive cyber risk management.
- [Incident Response](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42/respond): Investigation, containment, and remediation.
- [Managed Detection & Response (MDR)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/managed-detection-and-response): 24/7 monitoring and threat hunting.
- [Assessments](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42/assess): Risk, compromise, and ransomware readiness assessments.
- [Transform Services](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42/transform): vCISO, Zero Trust advisory, and program design.

## Cloud Security (Prisma Cloud)
- [Cloud Security Posture (CSPM)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cloud/cloud-security-posture-management): Automating identification and remediation of threats.
- [Cloud Workload Protection (CWP)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cloud/cloud-workload-protection): Securing workloads across environments.
- [Code Security](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cloud/code-security): Security across the development lifecycle (IaC).
- [Data Security (DSPM)](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cloud/data-security-posture-management): Discover, classify, and protect sensitive cloud data.

- [Partner Ecosystem](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/partners): NextWave partner program overview.
- [MSSPs](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/partners/managed-security-service-providers): Managed Security Service Providers.
- [Cloud Service Partners](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/partners/nextwave-for-csp): Security for AWS, Azure, Google Cloud.

## Resources
- [Blog](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/blog): Insights on AI, machine learning, and threat detection.
- [Cyberpedia](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/cyberpedia): Education on cybersecurity terms and models.
- [Trust Center](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/legal-notices/trust-center/compliance): Compliance and certifications.
- [Perspectives](https://www.paloaltonetworks.com/perspectives):Cybersecurity perspectives curated for executives. Expert advisory and viewpoints on todays security topics.
